mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer (phone, password, nickname, avatar) VALUES (#{phone}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customer WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM customer WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE customer
nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, password = #{password}, balance = #{balance},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE customer SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
